description: Legal document. Dated: Monday, 8 Iyyar 5509 AM, which is 1749 CE (not 1509 CE as catalogued). Reconciliation agreement between two partners, the goldsmiths Yūsuf b. Gedalya Ẓaʿir and Shalom b. Yeʿaqov Fayrūz. They will remain partners and treat each other well ("one heart and one intention") for another year and will divide all profits evenly. Witnesse: None.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
